answer:
The signal contains frequency components at 100 Hz, 200 Hz, and 250 Hz (since \(\omega = 2\pi f\)). The highest frequency is 250 Hz, so the Nyquist rate requires sampling at least twice that, which is 500 Hz. In terms of \(\pi\) Hz, this is \(500 \times 2\pi = 1000\pi\) rad/s, so the minimum sampling frequency is 1000 \(\pi\) Hz.  

\boxed{B}
